markdown:
# Talkie: Creative AI Community · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:45 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Samsung Tabs6_, 3/5: "this app is very fun,I love it. Its creative,fun and even has mini dialogue games. the only problem is that I don't understand this bug I've gotten and can't get rid of. When I start making a character, when I click "name" the keyboard does not show. I clicked it many times,redownloaded and it didn't work. Well the second thing I wanted to talk about was that when you redownload the app and go to your Talkie account,all the Talkies you chat with dissappear, I don't really like this function."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      6 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Shay Miller_, 2/5: "To much ads. Open app: ads, as soon as you text first: ads. It's so annoying to the point that it erases my whole entire reply and not to mention even when the text isn't inappropriate it looks like the AI wants the story goes their way an not mine. It forgets, changes the entire plot, talks for you and keeps saying the same thing in every Talkie. It's hella annoying"
            2. _Sterling Disch_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "I like its just the ads like when ur in a convo and it says wait 29 hours why would I wait 20+ hours just to talk to a character or watch an ad I wish they would remove that but other than that its pretty good maybe a little face verification because I caught my 6 year old daughter on it but yea pretty well app"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Triple Seven Investigations and Protection_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "so many ads just sorry I would love if you wouldn't have this cause it can be the best part of the story and you have to go through an add and that phone thing GEEZ I LOVE LOVEEE IT it's just I'm not gonna pay for gems every time genuinely who's with me that they just make it a no diamond thing cause i swear it's not just me disappointed Abt that oh and memory please work on it without payment"
